claim: Coding agents using stale pre-training context add broken instrumentation; fetching current docs after failure is slower and wastes tokens
actionable: Build skills that surface a natural-language search endpoint or current API reference to avoid hallucinations from outdated training data
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse

claim: Skills should surface structured information (sitemaps, API schemas in markdown) so agents don't waste tokens crawling documentation pages
actionable: When building skills, expose a documentation sitemap and request markdown format explicitly; this reduces token waste on HTML parsing
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse

claim: Agents should ask follow-up questions before making decisions because use cases span too many implementation patterns (online evals, offline, human-in-loop)
actionable: Design agent prompts to gather requirements before implementing; avoid assuming a single best approach for diverse domains
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse

claim: Referencing dynamic content is better than duplicating it in skills because duplicated content becomes stale and agents optimize it out
actionable: In skills, link to official docs with timestamps rather than copying content; auto-research loops will remove copied content if it doesn't serve the target function
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse

claim: Auto-research loops are powerful but risky: a poorly-defined target function will cause agents to remove documentation-fetching steps they deem unnecessary
actionable: Define target functions carefully; include requirements like 'fetch current docs' explicitly or agents will optimize them away to minimize turns
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse

claim: Tracing execution reveals 80% of implementation gaps; developers should inspect traces before building evals
actionable: After deploying an agent skill, instrument it with tracing; review the trace before adding evaluation metrics
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse

claim: Skills currently lack package management and auto-update mechanisms; timestamping skills and checking freshness is a workaround
actionable: For production skills, add a timestamp to track when they were last updated; monitor for stale skills and trigger manual updates
source_title: Skill issue: Lessons from skilling up coding agents to use Langfuse
